segments.text: This is not a shoe. It's actually a
perfume bottle. You probably think that
they made it just to look cool, but
building that was an absolute nightmare.
See, most perfume bottles are simple
glass squares or circles. Karolina
Herrera completely ignored that and made
a midnight blue stiletto with a golden
heel. But it was not just to look
different. The heel shape was chosen to
represent women who are both powerful
and elegant at the same time. But that
choice came up with a huge problem that
nobody expected. Perfume sprays need the
bottle to be standing straight up to
work properly. An angled heel breaks
that completely. They spent years trying
to make it work and eventually they
built a hidden mechanism inside the heel
that nobody can see. Finally able to
spray perfectly every single time. For
more brand secrets, subscribe.
